variant_name: 高令宁 — 高门闺秀议亲态
trigger: 重生后仍决定再入婚局，在高府正堂与闺房、门前等场景中主导提亲谈判、确认沈词重生并提出婚约条件时出现。

appearance_delta.face: 较主设定更显年轻，面部轮廓尚带闺阁少女的清润感，但眼神已明显冷硬警惕，唇线绷紧
appearance_delta.body: 身形轻盈挺拔，未见婚后操劳造成的清瘦感
appearance_delta.hair: 乌发梳作精致未嫁女子发髻，配珠钗步摇，闺秀感更强
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 姿态端正克制，目光审视感强，言辞发难时带压迫性；颈间伤痕记忆点通常不主动外露

costume_override.outfit: 高门闺秀式交领襦裙与绣花披帛，衣料考究但不张扬，适合正堂议亲与闺房会客

visual_reference: ancient Chinese noble young lady, Song dynasty style hanfu, elegant oval face, pale cool-toned skin, sharp bright slightly upturned eyes, black hair in refined maiden updo with pearl hairpins and buyao, poised posture in a noble family hall, layered cross-collar ruqun and embroidered pibo, proud and calculating expression, cinematic realistic lighting, delicate yet intimidating, historical drama realism
